name: employee-onboarding-tracker
description: Full-stack Employee Onboarding Task Tracker using Cloudflare Workers, D1, and React

scripts.db:seed: wrangler d1 execute --local --command='INSERT INTO employees (name, email, role, department) VALUES ("John Doe", "john.doe@company.com", "employee", "Engineering"), ("Jane Smith", "jane.smith@company.com", "admin", "HR"), ("Mike Johnson", "mike.johnson@company.com", "employee", "Marketing")'
